headlines.title: Oldest evidence of plague outbreak found in prehistoric graves, rewriting the disease’s history
headlines.description: A new study describes the oldest evidence of a plague outbreak ever found, in a set of skeletons excavated from prehistoric graves in Siberia dating back 5,500 years.

headlines.title: After years of failed treatments, this psych program finally worked. Now her family owes $1 million.
headlines.description: A specialized psychiatric treatment program helped this 24-year-old with her complex OCD. Now, her family owes the facility more than $1 million.

headlines.title: Inside IVF clinic’s embryo mix-up
headlines.description: A Florida couple who gave birth to a baby who is not biologically their own will keep their infant. The couple has reached an agreement with the genetic parents. NBC News’ Liz Kreutz has the story.

headlines.title: Experimental fentanyl vaccine showed promise in an early-stage trial
headlines.description: An experimental vaccine aimed at preventing fentanyl overdoses showed promise in an early-stage clinical trial, according to the drugmaker, ARMR Sciences. NBC News' Berkeley Lovelace Jr. explains how this breakthrough could combat the opioid crisis.

headlines.title: Important Steps You Can Take to Protect Brain Health as You Age
headlines.description: June is Alzheimer’s and Brain Awareness Month so Dr. Richard Isaacson joins TODAY to share important steps you can take to protect your brain as you age. Tips include putting a focus on learning, taking care of your teeth and more.

headlines.title: Best Oral Care Products: Toothbrushes, Whiteners, More
headlines.description: From toothbrushes and toothpastes, to whiteners that actually work, mouthwashes and more, NBC reporter Zoe Malin joins TODAY to share some top editor picks from NBC Select’s list of 50 Best Oral Products.

headlines.title: Is this $178 bra actually life-changing?
headlines.description: I tested the Forme Power Bra for five months to see if it could improve my posture and back support. Here’s what actually happened.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.

headlines.title: Tracking the Ebola outbreak: Where the deadly virus is spreading
headlines.description: Learn more about the deadly 2026 Ebola outbreak, including how many cases there are so far, which countries are most affected, how this outbreak compares with others in severity and more.

headlines.title: Nara Organics recalls infant formula after three babies are diagnosed with botulism
headlines.description: Nara Organics recalled its Whole Milk Organic Infant Formula sold nationwide after three children in three states developed infant botulism, according to federal health officials
